welcome.title: Getting Started
welcome.description: See what PingClaw can do and choose your interface language
welcome.label: Welcome

runtime.title: Environment Check
runtime.description: Make sure Node.js, OpenClaw, and the Gateway are ready
runtime.label: Env

installing.title: Install Components
installing.description: Set up Python and essential skills automatically
installing.label: Install

complete.title: All Set
complete.description: Setup is done — you can start chatting
complete.label: Done

import.title: Import Existing Data
import.description: Copy OpenClaw data from this computer onto your portable drive
import.label: Import

import.title: Import from this computer?
import.subtitle: We found an existing OpenClaw folder on this Mac or PC. You can copy it to your portable drive so agents, skills, and sessions come with you.
import.importingHint: Keep the app open. This may take a minute on slower USB drives.
import.successBody: Your OpenClaw data is now on the portable drive.

welcome.title: Welcome to PingClaw
welcome.nextHint: Next we'll check your environment — usually takes just a few seconds.

runtime.blockedHint: Some checks haven't passed yet. Fix the issues above or tap Re-check before continuing.
runtime.waitingHint: First Gateway startup may take 30–60 seconds. Keep the app open…
runtime.gatewayErrorAction: Try Start manually, or View Logs, then Re-check.
runtime.nodejsHint: Bundled runtime that powers the backend and skills — no separate install
runtime.openclawHint: Bundled AI agent engine for chats, tools, and skills
runtime.gatewayHint: Service that connects OpenClaw to models, skills, and messaging channels

status.gatewayTimeout: Startup timed out — check logs and retry

issue.title: Environment check failed
issue.desc: Try: ① View Logs for details ② Confirm OpenClaw is installed ③ Restart the app and Re-check

provider.label: Model Provider
provider.modelIdDesc: The model identifier from your provider (e.g. deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3)
provider.codePlanPresetDesc: Code Plan uses https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/coding/v3 and model ark-code-latest. Do not use /api/v3 for Code Plan traffic.
provider.storedLocally: Your API key is stored locally on your machine.

channel.title: Connect a Messaging Channel
channel.subtitle: Choose a platform to connect your AI assistant to. You can add more channels later in Settings.
channel.connectedDesc: Your channel has been configured. It will connect when the Gateway starts.

installing.subtitle: Installing Python and essential skills — please keep the app open.
installing.autoAdvanceHint: You'll move to the next step automatically when installation finishes.
installing.skipHint: Skip if you've already set this up manually; some skills may be unavailable.
installing.unknownError: An unknown error occurred during installation
installing.wait: First install usually takes 1–2 minutes. We'll continue automatically…

complete.title: Setup complete
complete.subtitle: Your environment is ready — time to chat.
nextSteps: Click Get Started to open the chat
Add an API key under Settings → AI Models (required before chatting)
Enable more skills on the Skills page as needed

skipSetupHintItems: You'll enter the app without runtime checks or component install
Chat won't work until Gateway is ready and an API key is configured
nav.completeHint: After entering the app, configure an AI model API key in Settings first.
